tasks.method: Scatter plot with churn score on the X-axis, satisfaction score on the Y-axis, CLTV encoded as point size, and risk categories encoded as color. Enable brushing and linking to highlight specific risk categories.
tasks.objective: Identify relationships among churn score, satisfaction score, and CLTV to understand risk categories visually and explore patterns in churn likelihood.

tasks.method: Box plot to display the distribution of churn scores across different demographic groups.
tasks.objective: Identify how churn score distributions vary across demographic groups and detect any outliers or patterns.

tasks.method: K-means clustering with a parallel coordinates chart to visualize cluster patterns and distinguish customer segments based on attributes.
tasks.objective: Group customers into similar clusters for understanding churn risk and suggesting personalized retention strategies.

tasks.method: Create a new categorical feature combining churn score, satisfaction score, and CLTV into risk levels ('High', 'Medium', 'Low'). Use color shading in heatmaps to show aggregated trends.
tasks.objective: Simplify analysis by summarizing churn risk factors into actionable risk-level categories.

tasks.method: Line chart showing average churn score against customer tenure. Enable range selection for zooming into specific tenure intervals.
tasks.objective: Understand how churn score trends evolve with tenure to identify time-based retention risks.

tasks.method: Interactive filtering with dropdown menus to dynamically focus on high churn scores and low satisfaction scores while preserving demographic breakdowns.
tasks.objective: Target customers at highest risk of churning for focused analysis and intervention.

tasks.method: Drill-down interactions to view individual customer details by clicking on scatter plot points or bars in visualizations.
tasks.objective: Allow deep analysis of individual customers' metrics for personalized retention strategies.

tasks.method: Pie chart showing the proportion of customers within each churn category (e.g., Stayed, Churned, Joined).
tasks.objective: Provide an easily interpretable overview of customer churn distribution and category shares.

tasks.method: Bar charts to compare average CLTV and churn scores across different demographic categories.
tasks.objective: Identify how customer lifetime value and churn likelihood vary by demographic segments.

tasks.method: Scatter plot matrix to detect customers with anomalies in churn, satisfaction, and revenue metrics. Highlight outliers using visual cues.
tasks.objective: Spot customers who exhibit unusual behavior for deeper investigation.
